summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all major requirements (parsing, aggregation, markdown rendering, CLI, workflow integration). Strengths: excellent E2E act harness with exact output matching across multiple scenarios, good module organization, proper isolation, clear test intent. Gaps: --output CLI flag untested, parser edge cases thin (no tests for XML entities, special characters in names, missing attributes, encoding issues), no verification that fixture files (run-1.xml, run-2.json) exist/are correct. Would catch most regressions in core logic but could be more thorough on boundary conditions in individual parsers.
